noTenant.superadmin: Pick a tenant on the "Platform" tab to view it here.
noTenant.member: Your user doesn't belong to any tenant yet.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your personal data. The email is also your sign-in identifier.
profile.emailAdminHint: The break-glass admin email is managed via ADMIN_USER (env).
profile.tenantSubtitle: The team (tenant) and role this session acts under.

password.title: Password
password.subtitle: Change your password. You'll need the current one.
password.noPassword: This account signs in with magic links and has no known password yet.
password.noPasswordHint: You sign in with magic links — no password is needed.
password.errorTooShort: The new password must be at least {{min}} characters.

twofa.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
twofa.subtitleOff: Add a second step to your sign-in with an authenticator app (TOTP).
twofa.subtitleOn: 2FA is active: signing in requires a code from your authenticator app.
twofa.scanHint: Scan the QR with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Aegis…) or enter the secret manually, then confirm with a generated code.
twofa.errorCode: Invalid code. Check your authenticator app and try again.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.subtitle: Devices and browsers currently signed in to your account. Sign out any you don't recognize.
sessions.confirmOneBody: This session will be signed out immediately.
sessions.confirmCurrentBody: This is your current session — signing it out will log you out of this device.
sessions.confirmOthersBody: Every other session will be signed out. This device stays signed in.
sessions.revokeError: Couldn't sign out the session. Please try again.

overview.tenantSubtitle: Details and quota usage of the tenant (team) your session belongs to.
overview.name: Name

members.title: Users / members
members.subtitleManage: Invite members by email and assign them a role. Owner manages everything; editor creates/edits; viewer only reads.
members.subtitleReadonly: Tenant members. Only an owner can invite or revoke.
members.inviteSuccess: Invite sent. They'll get an email with a link to join the team.
members.inviteCreatedNoEmail: Invite created, but the email couldn't be sent (SMTP unavailable). Revoke and retry, or share a login link manually.

invites.title: Pending invitations
invites.subtitle: People invited by email who haven't accepted yet. Revoking invalidates the emailed link.

platform.title: All tenants
platform.subtitle: Platform view. Pick a tenant to view it in the other tabs or adjust its quotas.
